misconfig_patterns: skip_auth=true in default config — /dbs and all data endpoints fully open
GET /dbs returns success + all database names without credentials
JD.com origin — common in CN cloud deployments (Aliyun, Huawei Cloud)

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include code:0, msg:success, and data array — unique to Vearch API format

deployment_tells: GET /dbs returns {code:0, msg:success, data:[...]} without auth
pivot_paths: GET /dbs → all database names without auth
GET /dbs/{db}/spaces/{space} → space schema + vector field config
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
